name: sunrise
description: Self-hosted GitHub action dashboard on Cloudflare.

scripts.verify: npm run types:cf && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && wrangler deploy

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: GitHub OAuth App Client ID. Create an OAuth App at https://github.com/settings/developers after Cloudflare shows your workers.dev URL.

GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET.description: GitHub OAuth App Client Secret from the same OAuth App. Store as a secret.

OWNER_LOGIN.description: Your GitHub username. Sunrise only allows this single owner to sign in.

OWNER_ID.description: Optional immutable GitHub numeric user ID for stronger owner validation.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Random long secret used for local session hardening. Generate with `openssl rand -base64 32`.
